skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all enemies. Ninjutsu Acid Bomb: Damage Taken ▲ 12% for 15 sec.
skill1.note: fullBurstEnter → enemy damageTakenPct 12 / 15s. Fires on every team Full Burst (hard rule 6).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects self. ATK ▲ 15.04% for 10 sec.
skill1.note: burstCast → self atkPct 15.04 / 10s. Only on rotations where SHE casts burst.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects enemies within attack range nearest to the crosshair. Ninjutsu Hyper Acid Bomb: Damage Taken ▲ 8% for 10 sec.
skill1.note: burstCast → enemy damageTakenPct 8 / 10s. nearest-crosshair = the single partless boss. Distinct named effect from the 12% Acid Bomb → co-stacks during overlap, faithful to kit.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Effects vary according to squad formation. Only one set of effects is applied.
skill2.note: Defender-count formation branch is user-selectable via modes, NOT auto-detected from squad (engine `formation` only supports B1-count). 'solo defender' is the DEFAULT (⚑3, assumed control-team case). Caveat #1.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self if there are no other Defender allies. Effect 1: Creates a Shield equal to 12.25% of the skill user's final Max HP for 10 sec.
skill2.note: passive (battle-start) → self shield maxHpPct 12.25 / 10s. Event-only, no HP pool; fires `shielded` triggers but has no in-kit consumer. Magnitude has no damage effect.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self if there are no other Defender allies. Effect 2: Attract: Taunt all enemies continuously.
skill2.note: Taunt; partless boss is unaffected by taunt → inert for damage. COLD.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self if there is another Defender ally. Effect 1: Ninjutsu Camouflage: Prevents being targeted by single-target attacks for 10 sec. Removed upon taking a direct hit.
skill2.note: Single-target immunity, defensive vs partless boss → no damage effect. COLD.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self if there is another Defender ally. Effect 2: Ninjutsu Injection: Recovers 11.22% of attack damage as HP continuously.
skill2.note: shotFired → self heal (per-pull ≈ continuous proxy). ⚠ The 11.22%-of-attack-damage MAGNITUDE is NOT in any block value and NOT in the unmodeled array — it is dropped as event-only and documented ONLY in the note ('amount unmodeled — heal is event-only'). Heal has no damage effect (no HP pool). See documentedConfounds.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when performing 200 normal attack(s). Affects self while in Attract status. Creates a Shield equal to 12.25% of the skill user's final Max HP for 10 sec.
skill2.note: hitCount 200 → self shield maxHpPct 12.25 / 10s. 'while in Attract' ≡ the solo branch. Event-only, no HP pool.

skill2.kitLine: Affects self every 4 sec while in Ninjutsu Injection status. Ninjutsu IFAK lasts for 4 sec. Function: Stores up HP recovery for a time, after which all allies are healed for the stored amount.
skill2.note: The all-ally heal DELIVERY is modeled as hitCount 200 → allies heal (⚑2 hitCount-200 proxy for the 'every 4 sec' timer — no timed-interval trigger exists; caveat #2). Fires teammate `recovery` triggers (Crown-style consumers). The 4s storage DELAY itself is unmodeled (see next line).

skill2.kitLine: Ninjutsu IFAK lasts for 4 sec (storage duration/delay before the stored heal is delivered).
skill2.note: The 4s storage delay/timer is unmodeled; cadence approximated by hitCount-200 proxy on skill2[3]. Heal has no magnitude → timing only matters as a recovery-trigger cadence. COLD for own damage.

skill2.kitLine: Effect 1: The maximum amount stored is equal to 165.28% of the skill user's final ATK.
skill2.note: IFAK stored-amount cap; heal has no magnitude/HP pool → no modeled effect. COLD.

skill2.kitLine: Effect 2: Once the duration ends, all allies are healed for the stored recovery amount.
skill2.note: Heal EVENT to allies is modeled (hitCount 200 → allies heal); the stored-amount MAGNITUDE is unmodeled (see unmodeled.skill2[3]). Event-only.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Distributed Damage ▲ 20% for 10 sec.
burst.note: burstCast → allies distributedDamagePct 20 / 10s. Team-facing damage lever.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 15% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.note: burstCast → allies casterAtkPct 15 / 10s ('15% of the skill user's ATK' = flat add of caster ATK). Team-facing damage lever.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 170% of final ATK as distributed damage.
burst.note: burstCast → enemy flatDamage atkPct 170, flavor 'distributed'. Auto-FB-exempt as burst-cast instant damage (no noFb); picks up her own +20% distributed buff landing same cast. This + MG normals = her own damage.

burst.kitLine: Affects self while in Attract status. Next shield's HP ▲ 20.13% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Scales shield SIZE; shields are event-only with no HP pool → no modeled effect (caveat #3). COLD.

burst.kitLine: Affects self while in Ninjutsu Injection status. Maximum Accumulation of Ninjutsu IFAK ▲ 20.13% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Scales IFAK heal-amount cap; heal is event-only with no HP pool → no modeled effect (caveat #3). COLD.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Defender-count formation branch is user-selected via modes ('solo defender' default) — not auto-detected from the squad; pick 'with defender ally' when another Defender is present.
documentedConfounds.why: Default matches the assumed solo-Defender control team, so faithful there. Branch flip only swaps shields/taunt (solo) for Injection-lifesteal/IFAK (with-defender) — all event-only/inert for damage in a partless-boss sim, so the damage delta between branches is minimal. Could go HOT only if a graded 2-Defender comp consumes recovery and the mode isn't flipped.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: IFAK all-ally heal cadence is a hitCount-200 proxy for 'every 4 sec' (unmeasured estimate).
documentedConfounds.why: Heal has no magnitude; cadence only matters as a teammate `recovery`-consumer trigger (Crown-style). No effect on Delta: Ninja Thief's own damage. Could matter for a recovery-consuming teammate's damage.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2/burst: shields and heals are event-only (no HP pools) — the shield-size and IFAK-accumulation ▲20.13% riders therefore have no modeled effect.
documentedConfounds.why: Shields/heals do not affect DPS in a partless-boss damage sim; the riders scale magnitudes that have no engine pool. Inert by construction.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Attract: Taunt all enemies continuously.
documentedConfounds.why: Taunt is irrelevant vs a partless boss and has no damage component.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Ninjutsu Camouflage (prevents being targeted by single-target attacks).
documentedConfounds.why: Defensive single-target immunity vs a partless boss; no damage effect.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Ninjutsu IFAK lasts for 4 sec (storage delay).
documentedConfounds.why: Timing of a heal that has no magnitude; only relevant as recovery-trigger cadence, already proxied by hitCount-200.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: maximum amount stored = 165.28% of final ATK (IFAK cap).
documentedConfounds.why: Heal magnitude with no HP pool → no damage effect.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Next shield's HP ▲ 20.13% for 10 sec.
documentedConfounds.why: Scales shield size; shields are event-only, no pool.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Maximum Accumulation of Ninjutsu IFAK ▲ 20.13% for 10 sec.
documentedConfounds.why: Scales heal-amount cap; heal is event-only, no pool.

documentedConfounds.text: Ninjutsu Injection 11.22%-of-attack-damage lifesteal MAGNITUDE is dropped (heal is event-only) — documented in the note but NOT listed in the unmodeled array.
documentedConfounds.why: Surfacing so the judge treats it as a KNOWN gap, not a silent drop. Self-heal magnitude has no HP pool and no damage effect; inert unless a self-recovery consumer appears.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ NEEDS-MEASUREMENT (1) CADENCE TUPLE [MANDATORY]: MG rate of fire (engine MG wind-up ladder + class default) + reloadFrames 171 + rolling-reload behavior; estimate = datamine as-is.
documentedConfounds.why: This is the one confound that directly drives her OWN damage (MG normal-attack DPS + burst gauge from 0.05/shot). Unmeasured. Author notes 'normal MG profile, no odd-fire-mode text tell → NOT escalated,' but it remains the mandatory unmeasured foundation of her damage number — the prime suspect if a real gap appears.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ NEEDS-MEASUREMENT (2) IFAK heal cadence — hitCount 200 as the 'every 4 sec' proxy.
documentedConfounds.why: Same as caveat #2; matters only as a teammate recovery-consumer trigger, not her own damage.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ NEEDS-MEASUREMENT (3) FORMATION-MODE DEFAULT — 'solo defender' assumed for the standard control team; verify per-comp.
documentedConfounds.why: Same as caveat #1; branch flip is largely damage-inert (event-only shields/heals), only recovery-consumer edge could matter.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ NEEDS-MEASUREMENT (4) Injection self-heal cadence — shotFired (per trigger pull) as the 'continuously' proxy.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert unless a self-recovery consumer appears; heal has no magnitude.

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline HYPOTHESIS (explicitly NOT validated — banner says hand-tune + record vs a real fight before trusting any number). Her own damage is modeled as MG normal attacks plus one burst distributed nuke (burst[1] flatDamage 170%, which picks up her own +20% distributed buff same cast); the team-facing levers are boss damageTakenPct 12%+8% (skill1) and allies casterAtkPct 15% + distributedDamagePct 20% (burst). skill2 is formation-branched via user-selectable modes ('solo defender' default → battle-start + hitCount-200 shields and taunt; 'with defender ally' → Injection lifesteal + IFAK all-ally heal as recovery-trigger events). Key approximations: ALL shields/heals are event-only with no HP pools, so every magnitude (12.25% shield, 11.22% lifesteal, 165.28% IFAK cap) and both ▲20.13% riders are inert; the IFAK 'every 4 sec' is a hitCount-200 proxy; and the MG cadence tuple is datamine-as-is and UNMEASURED (the mandatory gap most likely to move her own damage). Known-not-yet-faithful: Attract/Camouflage, IFAK storage delay/cap, all shield/heal magnitudes, and the cadence tuple all need measurement.
